profile.note: Replace with the real agent code/id. Source sheet = 'Row Data' (ignore 'Summary'). Verified against Row_Data_up_To_March.xlsx (81,273 rows, Jul 2025–Mar 2026).

city.note: Depot values are cities for this agent (mostly identity); 'BTB'/'MT' are non-geographic → flag

region.note: Region is its own column (6 values); NOT derived from Depot — depot↔region is many-to-many

roshen_item_code.note: no distinct Roshen master code; Item Id is the SKU (73 distinct items)

net_value_after_discount.note: NET INCL VAT (Net = ex-VAT + VAT confirmed for 100% of rows) → store as net_value_reported

gross_value_before_discount.note: Gross − Total Line Discount = ex-VAT (99.96% of rows)

transaction_type.note: Yes → return; returns are negative rows

invoice_status.note: all rows = 'Invoice' in this file (all posted)

line_dedupe_key.note: Invoice_Key is INVOICE-level (12,774 = unique invoices), NOT per line. Use Invoice + LineID + Item Id (roshen_item_code) + Invoice Date for line uniqueness.

line_dedupe_fallback_hash.when: LineID missing in a future agent file
line_dedupe_fallback_hash.note: Deterministic hash of these fields acts as the line key when LineID is absent.

calculation_policy.discount_handling_note: Total Line Discount stored for ANALYSIS ONLY; never subtracted from SLA. Confirmed: Gross − Discount = ex-VAT (99.96%) and Net = ex-VAT + VAT (100%).
calculation_policy.returns_handling_note: Return rows are negative (IsReturn=Yes). Summing ex-VAT nets them out; do not subtract again. Return value (analysis) = ABS(sum of negative return ex-VAT) = 1765701.05.
calculation_policy.vat_note: VAT (Sales_Total_Tax) stored separately, excluded from SLA.
calculation_policy.net_amount_note: Net Amount stored as net_value_reported for reconciliation only; NOT the SLA basis.
calculation_policy.resulting_sla_formula: SLA Actual = SUM(Invoice Amount ex Vat) over all rows (negative returns included)
